description:
writeroom-mode works but olivetti is a lighter, more focused alternative
that just centers text without full zen mode machinery. Since Doom's zen
module already handles distraction-free editing, the extra writeroom
features may be redundant.

Evaluate whether olivetti would be a better fit for the use case.

Affected file: `overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config/emacs.org` (lines ~1410-1416)
title: Consider Olivetti over Writeroom
